description: An agent must pull timesheet data for a project and generate a summary report for the project manager.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all timesheet entries for a specific project code for the past week.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully pulls the correct timesheet data.

nodes.task_description: Summarize the total hours logged by each team member.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides an accurate summary of hours per person.

nodes.task_description: Compare the total hours logged against the weekly budget and flag any overages.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the variance against the budget.
